nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest test runner configuration for the shared package, defining test environment and module resolution settings.

nodes.name: embedded-postgres@18.1.0-beta.16.patch
nodes.summary: Patch file fixing a bug or compatibility issue in the embedded-postgres v18.1.0-beta.16 dependency used by the Paperclip server for its embedded database engine.

nodes.name: pnpm-workspace.yaml
nodes.summary: pnpm monorepo workspace configuration declaring all package locations including packages, adapters, plugins (excluding sandbox-provider standalone plugins), the server, UI, and CLI packages.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive project overview for Paperclip — the open-source Node.js/React AI agent orchestration platform — covering features, quickstart guide, architecture overview, FAQ, development setup, roadmap, and community links.

nodes.name: .gitkeep
nodes.summary: Empty placeholder file ensuring the releases directory is tracked by git before any release notes are added.

nodes.name: v0.2.7.md
nodes.summary: Release notes for Paperclip v0.2.7 documenting improvements and bug fixes in this early release.

nodes.name: v0.3.0.md
nodes.summary: Release notes for Paperclip v0.3.0 covering highlights, improvements, bug fixes, and contributor credits.

nodes.name: v0.3.1.md
nodes.summary: Release notes for Paperclip v0.3.1 including highlights, improvements, bug fixes, upgrade guide, and contributor credits.

nodes.name: v2026.318.0.md
nodes.summary: Release notes for Paperclip v2026.318.0 with highlights, improvements, bug fixes, upgrade guide, and contributors.

nodes.name: v2026.325.0.md
nodes.summary: Release notes for Paperclip v2026.325.0 covering highlights, improvements, bug fixes, upgrade guide, and contributors.

nodes.name: v2026.403.0.md
nodes.summary: Release notes for Paperclip v2026.403.0 covering highlights, improvements, bug fixes, upgrade guide, and contributors.

nodes.name: v2026.414.0.md
nodes.summary: Release notes for Paperclip v2026.414.0 including a Security section alongside highlights, improvements, bug fixes, upgrade guide, and contributors.

nodes.name: v2026.415.0.md
nodes.summary: Release notes for Paperclip v2026.415.0 documenting highlights, improvements, and bug fixes for this patch release.

nodes.name: v2026.416.0.md
nodes.summary: Release notes for Paperclip v2026.416.0 covering highlights, improvements, bug fixes, security updates, upgrade guide, and contributors.

nodes.name: v2026.427.0.md
nodes.summary: Release notes for Paperclip v2026.427.0 including beta features, highlights, improvements, bug fixes, security notes, upgrade guide, and contributors.

nodes.summary: Release notes for Paperclip v2026.428.0 documenting highlights, improvements, bug fixes, upgrade guide, and contributors.

nodes.name: v2026.512.0.md
nodes.summary: Release notes for Paperclip v2026.512.0 (the latest release) covering highlights, improvements, bug fixes, and an upgrade guide.

nodes.name: 2026-03-13-08-46-token-optimization-implementation.md
nodes.summary: Internal implementation report from March 2026 documenting the analysis and results of token optimization work, likely covering LLM context-window cost reductions for agent interactions.

nodes.name: ROADMAP.md
nodes.summary: Public product roadmap for Paperclip listing 9 completed milestones (plugin system, skills manager, scheduled routines, budgeting, agent reviews, multi-user support) and 11 upcoming features including cloud agents, memory, enforced outcomes, and desktop app.

nodes.name: backfill-issue-reference-mentions.ts
nodes.summary: One-off database backfill script that re-syncs issue reference mentions for all companies, using the issueReferenceService to propagate existing mentions that may have been missed.

nodes.name: backup-db.sh
nodes.summary: Shell convenience wrapper that triggers the Paperclip embedded-postgres database backup via the CLI, backing up to the configured instance data directory.

nodes.name: bootstrap-npm-package.mjs
nodes.summary: CLI helper for the one-time human-gated first publish of a new @paperclipai npm package, handling npm auth validation, OTP-based 2FA, package inspection, and publishing with a dry-run mode.

nodes.name: bootstrap-npm-package.test.mjs
nodes.summary: Test suite for the bootstrap-npm-package.mjs script, verifying argument parsing and package resolution logic.

nodes.name: build-npm.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that builds the paperclipai CLI package for npm publishing using esbuild to bundle all workspace code into a single distributable file, with optional forbidden-token and typecheck steps.

nodes.name: build-standalone-public-packages.mjs
nodes.summary: Build script that discovers all public non-private workspace packages, then builds and copies each into a standalone output directory for independent npm distribution.
